message:
feat(tests): add comprehensive E2E tests for list and search commands (beads_rust-pyzi)

Add 1443 lines of comprehensive E2E test coverage:
- e2e_list_scenarios.rs: 29 tests for filters (status, type, priority, assignee, label), sort options, limit, output formats (text, JSON, CSV), edge cases
- e2e_search_scenarios.rs: 18 tests for search functionality, filters, output formats, edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
